name: Pasithea Therapeutics Corp.
summary: PART I Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery, research and development of innovative treatments for RASopathies, MAPK pathway-driven tumors, and other diseases, including central nervous system (CNS) disorders.
